name: Acorn Squash in Roasted Apples
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Acorn squash, peeled and chopped
3 large Pippin apples, cut in half horizontally
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cut the squash lengthwise and remove seeds and fibers. Place cut side down in a baking dish.
3. Pour stock into the dish. Place in the oven and bake for 20 minutes.
4. Scoop out the fruit from the apples, leaving a 1/4 border. Remove squash from the oven.
5. Place apples cut side down in the baking dish around the squash. Return to oven and bake until squash and apples are just tender, about 15-20 more minutes.
6. Turn squash and apples over. Dot with butter and brown sugar. Return to oven for 10 minutes.
7. Remove from oven. Transfer apples to a warm platter, covered. Scoop squash flesh into a medium bowl.
8. Mash with cream, walnut oil, cinnamon, and ginger, adding salt and pepper to taste. Scoop the mixture into apple halves and serve.
